author: gm
events_i_witnessed: Maren failed her check to navigate the lower corridor, leading herself and her injured brother Tomas into a dead-end conduit flooded with mineral runoff and rising steam.
Corwin refused to retreat from the freezing maintenance room, choosing to cradle the leaking primordial salt canister to his chest.
Corwin suffered severe frostbite damage to his left arm, leaving both of his arms functionally staggered and unresponsive.
The manual pressure hatch remained jammed open by a three-inch gap, allowing a thread of glittering primordial vapor to slowly seep into the corridor toward Maren and Tomas.
beliefs: Maren is driven by a deep, protective instinct to save Tomas, but her panic and lack of familiarity with the maintenance layout have trapped her in a hazardous dead-end.
Corwin is entirely consumed by the primordial salt's sweet compulsion, viewing the freezing hazard as a warm protector and his physical injuries as beautiful silver lace.
Both characters are on the absolute brink of catastrophic failures—either a permanent limb sever for Corwin or a suffocating breakdown for both in the encroaching vapor.
open_threads: How will Maren find a way out of the dead-end flooded conduit before the creeping primordial vapor catches up to her and Tomas?
Will Corwin finally drop the freezing canister to save his limbs, or will his obsession lead to a permanent physical sever or total psychological Break?
What lies beyond the dead-end conduit, and is there another way to access the lower filtration tanks or drainage sluices?
